claim_boundary: analysis-only synthesis of the Issue #2308 AMV timeout trace rerun; not benchmark-strength, calibrated AMV, hardware, safety, planner-ranking, or paper-facing evidence

rerun_decision.reason: Issue #2308 already reran the same matched AMV actuation-smoke row after Issue #2268 identified missing per-step timeout traces and promoted the requested decomposition field block.

decision_rationale.feasibility_improved_but_route_blocked: accepted: command clipping fell from 22 to 15 steps and early clip fraction from 0.75 to 0.40, but both rows stayed timeout_low_progress about 3.6 m from the goal
decision_rationale.feasibility_improved_but_speed_too_low: not selected as primary: mean average speed changed by only +0.0047 m/s and late progress was slightly higher for actuation-aware, but late-episode speed-cap binding is not separately instrumented
decision_rationale.scoring_too_conservative: not selected as primary: lower requested/applied speeds did not create a success-relevant progress loss in the tracked trace, but scoring conservativeness is not directly instrumented
decision_rationale.unrelated_navigation_deadlock: not instrumented: the tracked fields point to route/task progress remaining insufficient, but no deadlock/oscillation detector is present

amv_timeout_decomposition.progress_over_time: Both candidates made similar positive route progress but remained about 3.6 m from the goal at horizon.
amv_timeout_decomposition.clipping_over_time: Actuation-aware scoring reduced early-window clipping from 0.75 to 0.40 and total clip steps from 22 to 15.
amv_timeout_decomposition.saturation_over_time: Yaw-rate saturation stayed zero for both candidates across all windows.
amv_timeout_decomposition.command_speed_profile: Actuation-aware scoring requested and applied lower linear speeds on average, but terminal progress was effectively unchanged.

next_research_direction: Keep actuation-aware scoring diagnostic-only and investigate route-progress geometry or horizon/task completion blockers before adding another AMV actuation scorer.
